article.title: Noizekid: Moombahton and Dancehall Production in Mexico
article.subtitle: A profile of the Mexican producer known for collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of the Noizekid Sample Pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a distinct approach within the electronic music landscape.

In addition to his collaborative work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, a collection that includes his signature samples, loops, and drum sounds used across various productions.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, highlighting his influence within the Latin electronic scene.
